---
title: "International Sandy Beach Symposium"
---

The International Sandy Beach Symposium is a triennial conference focused on the environmental, social and economic dimensions of sandy beach science, conservation, and management. First held in South Africa in 1983, the symposium returns to the Eastern Cape for ISBS10.

The **10th International Sandy Beach Symposium** will be held at the **Cape St Francis Resort, 21-27 June 2027**. See you there!

![Maitlands Beach, St Francis Bay. Photo credit: Linda Harris](imgs/maitlands.png){width="100%"}

## Important dates

**1 August 2026** Call for abstracts and registration opens

**October/November 2026** Conference sponsorship call (to be confirmed)

**31 December 2026** Deadline for cancellation refunds (100% of fees)

**28 February 2027** Abstract submission closes

**31 March 2027** Last day for cancellation refunds (50% of fees)

**30 April 2027** Full conference registration and merchandise orders close

**31 May 2027** Day registration closes

**20 June 2027** Arrival day for ISBS10

## Partners and sponsors

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; align-items:center;">

  <div style="margin:0.5rem 1rem;">
    <a href="https://www.sandybeachscience.org" target="_blank">
      <img src="imgs/BFL_logo.png" 
      height="70">
    </a>
  </div>

  <div style="margin:0.5rem 1rem;">
    <a href="https://www.mandela.ac.za/" target="_blank">
      <img src="imgs/mandelauni.png"
      height="70">
    </a>
  </div>

  <div style="margin:0.5rem 1rem;">
    <a href="https://cmr.mandela.ac.za/" target="_blank">
      <img src="imgs/cmr.jpg" height="70">
    </a>
  </div>

</div>
```

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; align-items:center;">

  <div style="margin:0.5rem 1rem;">
    <a href="https://www.biodiversa.eu/2026/04/03/tidelines/" target="_blank">
      <img src="imgs/Biodiversa.jpg" height="70">
    </a>
  </div>

  <div style="margin:0.5rem 1rem;">
    <a href="https://www.biodiversa.eu/2026/04/03/tidelines/" target="_blank">
      <img src="imgs/TIDELINES.png" height="70">
    </a>
  </div>

</div>
```
